## Decisions (D#) — [DECISIONS.md](DECISIONS.md)

- **D1** · ACCEPTED · [pricing] — Pricing & funnel architecture
- **D2** · ACCEPTED · [pricing] — Bundle the **6-month** tier (not 12) into the full package
- **D3** · ACCEPTED · [live, platform] — Live ⇄ online: both must be viable; no pre-committed lead
- **D4** · ACCEPTED · [pricing, platform] — Sequence monetization: transactional report **first**, subscription **after**
- **D5** · ACCEPTED · [trust, brand] — Ranking framing: "Top X% among TPC challengers" + disclose the cohort
- **D6** · ACCEPTED · [trust] — Integrity model: graded, explainable trust (the paid-tier moat)
- **D7** · ACCEPTED · [platform, live] — The long arc: platform-first → digitized live → unified portfolio
- **D8** · ACCEPTED · [workspace] — Workspace governance: one global truth, module docs cite it, machine-enforced

## Hypotheses (H#) — [HYPOTHESES.md](HYPOTHESES.md)

- **H1** · PARTIAL · [pricing, brand] — Parents pay for measurement/insight, not content
- **H2** · UNVALIDATED · [trust, platform] — The measurement WTP transfers to at-home online (the trust-transfer bet)
- **H3** · MODELLED · [pricing, platform] — Online can self-sustain at a reachable report-attach rate
- **H4** · SUPPORTED · [growth] — TPC demand is D2C parent-pull, not channel-push
- **H5** · ASSUMED · [ops, platform] — Build/maintenance cost trends down over time (AI leverage)
- **H6** · ASSERTED · [trust] — Credible-ranking / integrity IS the paid-tier moat (not a feature)
